title: AGIBOT生产第15,000台机器人，标志着实体人工智能部署的里程碑
summary: AGIBOT has rolled out 15,000 wheeled semi-humanoid robots as it moves from embodied AI from development and production to deployment. The post AGIBOT produces 15,000th robot, marking a milestone in embodied AI deployment appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：AGIBOT produces 15,000th robot, marking a milestone in embodied AI deployment）
